name: Zombie
description: A hostile mob that spawns in dark areas. It burns in sunlight and drops rotten flesh. Attacks in melee range.

name: Skeleton
description: A hostile mob that shoots arrows. It burns in sunlight. Drops bones, arrows, and sometimes a bow.

name: Creeper
description: A hostile mob that silently approaches players and explodes. Drops gunpowder. Can be killed by a charged Creeper to drop a music disc.

name: Spider
description: Spiders are hostile at night and neutral in daylight. They can climb walls and drop string and spider eyes.

name: Enderman
description: A tall hostile mob that teleports and picks up blocks. It becomes aggressive if looked at directly. Drops ender pearls.

name: Witch
description: Witches throw splash potions at players. They spawn in swamps and during raids. Drop potion ingredients.

name: Slime
description: Slimes spawn in swamp biomes and slime chunks. They split into smaller slimes when killed. Drop slime balls.

name: Blaze
description: A hostile mob found in Nether fortresses. It flies and shoots fireballs. Drops blaze rods, which are needed for eyes of ender and brewing.

name: Ghast
description: A flying hostile mob in the Nether that shoots explosive fireballs. Drops ghast tears and gunpowder.

name: Ender Dragon
description: The final boss of Minecraft. It lives in the End and is defeated by destroying the end crystals, then attacking the dragon when it perches.

name: Wither
description: A boss mob spawned by placing 4 soul sand in a T shape and 3 wither skeleton skulls on top. Drops a nether star.

name: Wither Skeleton
description: Wither skeletons spawn in Nether fortresses. They inflict the Wither effect and drop coal, bones, and rarely skulls.

name: Piglin
description: Piglins are neutral if the player wears gold armor. They become hostile if attacked or if gold is not worn. They barter with gold ingots.

name: Hoglin
description: Hoglins are hostile mobs found in Crimson Forests. They drop pork and leather. They are scared of warped fungi.

name: Zombified Piglin
description: Zombified piglins are neutral unless attacked. They spawn in the Nether and drop gold nuggets and rotten flesh.

name: Cow
description: Cows are passive mobs that spawn in grasslands. They drop leather and raw beef, and can be milked with a bucket.

name: Pig
description: Pigs are passive mobs that spawn in grasslands. They drop raw porkchops and can be ridden with a saddle and carrot on a stick.

name: Sheep
description: Sheep are passive mobs that drop wool and mutton. They can be sheared for wool and dyed different colors.

name: Chicken
description: Chickens are passive birds that drop feathers and raw chicken. They lay eggs periodically.

name: Villager
description: Villagers live in villages and trade items for emeralds. They have professions based on their workstation block.

name: Iron Golem
description: Iron golems are neutral mobs that protect villagers. They can be crafted from iron blocks and a carved pumpkin. Drop iron ingots and poppies.
